summary: Frontend testing completed for The Doggy Bakery e-commerce site. All reported bugs have been verified as FIXED: 1) Hampers page now shows correct title 'Gift Hampers & Party Boxes' with 13 products, 2) Product modal works correctly with single modal, dark backdrop, close button (X), and backdrop click to close, 3) No modal overlap bug detected even with rapid clicking, 4) Mira AI widget has close button in header that works correctly.

issues: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning in product modal

critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx modal implementation is correct with z-index 9999 and proper backdrop click handling
MiraAI.jsx has close button (X) in header with proper state management
ProductListing.jsx getCategoryTitle() correctly handles 'hampers' case returning 'Gift Hampers & Party Boxes 🎁'
Modal uses stopPropagation correctly to prevent backdrop click from closing when clicking inside modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been verified as fixed. Hampers page shows correct title and 13 products. Product modal works correctly with no overlap issues. Mira AI close button works. Add to Cart functionality works and opens cart sidebar.

hampers_page_title.details: Hampers page (/hampers) shows 'Gift Hampers & Party Boxes 🎁' title with 13 products

product_modal_open.details: Product modal opens correctly when clicking product card with dark backdrop (bg-black/70)

product_modal_close_button.details: Close button (X) visible in modal and closes modal when clicked

product_modal_no_overlap.details: Opening multiple products sequentially shows only one modal at a time - no overlap bug

product_modal_rapid_click.details: Rapid open/close of modals does not cause overlap

mira_ai_close_button.details: Mira AI widget has close button (X) in header that closes the widget

add_to_cart.details: Add to Cart button visible and functional - adds item to cart and shows cart sidebar with toast notification

mobile_viewport_hampers.details: Hampers page displays correctly on mobile (390x844)

mobile_viewport_modal.details: Product modal opens and closes correctly on mobile

mobile_viewport_mira_ai.details: Mira AI opens and closes correctly on mobile

bugs_verified_fixed: Hampers category page showing 'All Products' - FIXED: Now shows 'Gift Hampers & Party Boxes 🎁'
Mira AI chat widget needs close button - FIXED: Close button (X) present in header
Product modal overlap bug - NOT REPRODUCIBLE: Modal works correctly with no overlap
